ex02_filter:
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, o.order_status, o.date_order_placed
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Shipped';
ex04_group_by:
SELECT order_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count 
FROM Orders 
GROUP BY order_status 
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
ex05_join:
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_status AS status, c.customer_name
FROM Orders o
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'Shipped'
ex06_multi_join:
SELECT s.shipment_tracking_number, s.order_id, c.customer_name
FROM Shipments s
JOIN Orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN Customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
ORDER BY s.shipment_tracking_number;
ex07_subquery:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id, c.customer_name
FROM Customers c
JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'On Road'
ex08_order_limit:
SELECT c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count
FROM Customers c
JOIN Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 5
ex10_having:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM Orders
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ex11_timerange:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM Orders
WHERE date_order_placed >= '2024-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND date_order_placed <= '2024-03-31 23:59:59';
ex12_timerange_month_compare:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN date_order_placed >= '2026-06-01' AND date_order_placed < '2026-07-01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS order_count_june_2026,
    SUM(CASE WHEN date_order_placed >= '2026-05-01' AND date_order_placed < '2026-06-01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS order_count_may_2026
FROM Orders;
ex13_anti_join:
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_id, p.product_name
FROM Order_Items oi
JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE oi.order_item_id NOT IN (
    SELECT order_item_id
    FROM Shipment_Items
);
ex14_anomaly:
SELECT 
    date(date_order_placed) AS order_date,
    COUNT(order_id) AS daily_order_count
FROM Orders
WHERE date_order_placed >= '2026-05-01 00:00:00' 
  AND date_order_placed < '2026-07-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY date(date_order_placed)
ORDER BY order_date;
ex15_visualization:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', shipment_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS shipment_count
FROM Shipments
WHERE shipment_date >= '2025-07-01' AND shipment_date <= '2026-06-30'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', shipment_date)
ORDER BY month;
ex16_visualization_forecast:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date_order_placed) AS month,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
FROM Orders
WHERE date_order_placed >= '2025-11-01' 
  AND date_order_placed < '2026-06-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', date_order_placed)
ORDER BY month;
ex17_report:
SELECT strftime('%Y', date_order_placed) AS order_year, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM Orders
GROUP BY order_year
ORDER BY order_year;
ex18_report_with_knowledge:
SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(s.shipment_id) AS shipment_count
FROM Shipments s
JOIN Orders o ON s.order_id = o.order_id
GROUP BY o.order_status
ORDER BY o.order_status;
ex22_count_distinct:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS distinct_customers
FROM Orders;
ex23_category_normalization:
SELECT CASE WHEN INSTR(p.product_name, '-') > 0 
  THEN SUBSTR(p.product_name, 1, INSTR(p.product_name, '-') - 1) 
  ELSE p.product_name END AS category,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS order_count
FROM Order_Items oi
JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY order_count DESC
ex25_avg_items_per_order:
SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_name,
    AVG(item_counts.items_per_order) AS avg_items_per_order
FROM 
    Customers c
JOIN 
    Orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            order_id,
            COUNT(order_item_id) AS items_per_order
        FROM 
            Order_Items
        GROUP BY 
            order_id
    ) item_counts ON o.order_id = item_counts.order_id
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_id, c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
ex26_daily_orders_last_30_days:
SELECT date_order_placed, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM Orders
GROUP BY date_order_placed
ORDER BY date_order_placed;
ex27_shipments_between_dates:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_shipments
FROM Shipments
WHERE shipment_date >= '2024-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND shipment_date <= '2024-03-31 23:59:59';
ex28_order_trend_2024:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date_order_placed) AS month,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
FROM Orders
WHERE date_order_placed >= '2024-01-01' AND date_order_placed < '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', date_order_placed)
ORDER BY month;
ex29_q1_category_report_with_knowledge:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(p.product_name, '-') > 0 
        THEN SUBSTR(p.product_name, 1, INSTR(p.product_name, '-') - 1)
        ELSE p.product_name 
    END AS category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS total_items,
    CAST(COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS avg_items_per_order
FROM Order_Items oi
JOIN Products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN Orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.date_order_placed >= '2026-01-01 00:00:00' 
  AND o.date_order_placed < '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total_orders DESC;
ex30_daily_order_volume_report:
SELECT date(date_order_placed) AS order_date, COUNT(*) AS daily_order_count
FROM Orders
GROUP BY date(date_order_placed)
ORDER BY order_date;
